sourceLabel: City of Charlottetown 2025-26 Operating Budget (Annual Budget page)
dataStatusNote: Total ($110M for City Corporation + Water and Sewer Utility) and combined Police+Fire ($22.4M) are confirmed from the City's announcement; remaining bucket allocations are proportional estimates pending line-item transcription. The Water and Sewer Utility (a separately-funded portion of the $110M) is included for completeness — uncertainty here is meaningful and should be resolved with the official budget book.

nativeDepartments.name: Charlottetown Police Services + Fire Department (combined $22.4M, confirmed)
Public Works (roads, snow, sidewalks) + Charlottetown Transit (estimated)
Water and Sewer Utility is bundled in the $110M total but funded by user fees — treated as utility for comparison consistency
Mayor & Council, CAO, Legal, Clerk, HR, IT, Finance ops (estimated)
Fiscal services / debt servicing / capital transfers (estimated)
Water and Sewer Utility operating + grants and other (estimated)
